title: Stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq, Dow futures tick up after gauges close April on record highs
body: Oops, something went wrong US stock futures ticked higher Friday morning, building on a powerful rally that pushed major indexes to fresh records and capped a standout April for equities. Futures tied to the Dow Jones Industrial Average ( YM=F ) and S&P 500 ( ES=F ) edged up 0.2% and 0.1%, respectively. Nasdaq 100 futures ( NQ=F ) hovered above the baseline. During Thursday’s regular session , stocks surged across the board. The Dow ( ^DJI ) rallied more than 790 points, or 1.6%, while the S&P 500 ( ^GSPC ) climbed just over 1% to close above 7,200 for the first time on record. The Nasdaq Composite ( ^IXIC ) added nearly 0.9% and also reached a new high. In after-hours trading, Apple ( AAPL ) jumped roughly 3% after delivering better-than-expected fiscal second-quarter results . The tech

title: Dow Jones Futures Rise As Apple Climbs On Earnings, Sandisk Skids; Stock Market At High
body: BREAKING: Apple Leads Earnings Movers After S&P 500, Nasdaq Hit Highs Dow Jones futures rose slightly early Friday, along with S&P 500 futures and Nasdaq futures. Apple (AAPL), Sandisk (SNDK), Western Digital (WDC) and Roku (ROKU) all beat earnings views after the close. The stock market rally had a solid session with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq hitting new highs amid massive earnings news and crude oil prices pulling back. title: USA Rare Earth (USAR) Climbs 18% — Here’s What Propelled The Stock
body: Oops, something went wrong USA Rare Earth Inc. (NASDAQ:USAR) is one of the 10 Stocks Delivering Eye-Popping Gains. Shares in USA Rare Earth jumped by 17.88 percent on Thursday to close at $25.97 apiece, as investors positioned portfolios in high-growth stocks, supported by a broader market optimism. USA Rare Earth Inc. (NASDAQ:USAR) mirrored the rally in the wider market during the day, with the Dow Jones and the S&P 500 both clocking more than 1 percent gains. The Nasdaq, on the other hand, rose by 0.89 percent. USA Rare Earth's magnet facility in Stillwater, Oklahoma. title: Lightwave Logic (LWLG) Soars 16.7% on AI Boom
body: Oops, something went wrong Lightwave Logic Inc. (NASDAQ:LWLG) is one of the 10 Stocks Delivering Eye-Popping Gains. Lightwave rallied for a second day on Thursday, climbing 16.67 percent to finish at $13.72 apiece, as investors increased their exposure in high-growth stocks, with sentiment remaining fueled by the booming AI. The stock also mirrored the rally on Wall Street’s indices, with the Dow Jones and the S&P 500 clocking more than 1 percent gains. The Nasdaq, on the other hand, increased by 0.89 percent.
